field.label: Protocol
field.help: Source routing protocol to redistribute into IS-IS.

field.label: Level
field.help: IS-IS level into which the redistributed routes are injected.

field.label: Metric
field.help: Optional metric to assign to redistributed routes. Leave empty to use the default metric.

field.label: Route-Map
field.help: Optional route-map name to filter or modify redistributed routes. The route-map must be defined in FRR separately.
